headline: Morgan Stanley Upgrades Equity Residential to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $74
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Adam Kramer   upgrades Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $72 to $74.

raw.headline: Morgan Stanley Upgrades Equity Residential to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $74
raw.summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Adam Kramer   upgrades Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) from Equal-Weight to Overweight and raises the price target from $72 to $74.

headline: Family offices make opportunistic bets on real estate as investors sit on sidelines
summary: Investment firms of ultra-wealthy families are snapping up bargains in multifamily and commercial real estate.
